GameKey.description: A 9 digit unique code identifying the game that this record corresponds to. The GameID is composed of Season; SeasonType; Week and HomeTeam.. Note: This value will be NULL for bye weeks

PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this player corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=All-Star)

Season.description: The NFL season of the game

GameDate.description: The date and time the game is scheduled to start

Week.description: The NFL week of the game (regular season: 1 to 18; preseason: 0 to 4; postseason: 1 to 4). Note: seasons after 2021 will have only 3 preseason weeks

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team that the player is on. Note: if this player is a free agent; this field is NULL

Opponent.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the opponent team

HomeOrAway.description: Whether the team is home or away

Position.description: The primary position of the player. Possible Values: C; CB; DB; DE; DL; DT; FB; FS; G; ILB; K; KR; LB; LS; NT; OL; OLB; OT; P; QB; RB; S; SS; T; TE; WR

PositionCategory.description: The category of the player's position (OFF; DEF; ST)

Activated.description: Whether or not the player was active for the game

Played.description: Whether the player played at least one snap in the game Note: Will return "1" if player played at least one snap and "0" if they did not

Started.description: Whether the player started the game (on offensive or defense). Note: Started = 1 / Did Not Start = 0

PassingAttempts.description: Total passes thrown by the player in the game

PassingCompletions.description: Total passes completed by the player in the game

PassingYards.description: Total passing yards by the player in the game

PassingCompletionPercentage.description: The percentage of passes completed by the player in the game

PassingYardsPerAttempt.description: Total average passing yards per attempt by the player in the game

PassingYardsPerCompletion.description: Total average passing yards per completion by the player in the game

PassingTouchdowns.description: Total passing touchdowns by the player in the game

PassingInterceptions.description: Total interceptions thrown by the player in the game

PassingRating.description: The passer rating of the player in the game

PassingLong.description: Total yards of longest completion by the player in the game

PassingSacks.description: The total number of times the player was sacked in the game

PassingSackYards.description: Total yards lost by the player in the game as a result of being sacked

RushingAttempts.description: Total rushing attempts by the player in the game

RushingYards.description: Total rushing yards by the player in the game

RushingYardsPerAttempt.description: Total rushing yards per attempt by the player in the game

RushingTouchdowns.description: Total rushing touchdowns by the player in the game

RushingLong.description: The longest rush by the player in the game

ReceivingTargets.description: Total receiving targets by the player in the game

Receptions.description: Total receptions by the player in the game

ReceivingYards.description: Total receiving yards by the player in the game

ReceivingYardsPerReception.description: Average receiving yards per reception by the player in the game

ReceivingTouchdowns.description: Total receiving touchdowns by the player in the game

ReceivingLong.description: The longest reception by the player in the game

Fumbles.description: Total fumbles by the player in the game

FumblesLost.description: Total fumbles lost by the player in the game

PuntReturns.description: Total punt returns by the player in the game

PuntReturnYards.description: Total punt return yards by the player in the game

PuntReturnYardsPerAttempt.description: Total average yards gained per punt return by the player in the game

PuntReturnTouchdowns.description: Total punt return touchdowns by the player in the game

PuntReturnLong.description: The longest punt return by the player in the game

KickReturns.description: Total kickoff returns by the player in the game

KickReturnYards.description: Total kickoff return yards by the player in the game

KickReturnYardsPerAttempt.description: Average yards gained per kick return by the player in the game

KickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total kickoff return touchdowns by the player in the game

KickReturnLong.description: Longest kick return by the player in the game

SoloTackles.description: Total defensive solo (unassisted) tackles by the player in the game

AssistedTackles.description: Total defensive assisted tackles by the player in the game

TacklesForLoss.description: Total tackles for loss by the player in the game. Note: these are tackles behind the line of scrimmage for loss of yards (including sacks)

Sacks.description: Total defensive sacks by the player in the game

SackYards.description: Total defensive sacks yards by the player in the game

QuarterbackHits.description: Total quarterback hits by the player in the game. Note: This is a defensive stat that includes sacks

PassesDefended.description: Total passes defended by the player in the game

FumblesForced.description: Total fumbles forced on defense by the player in the game

FumblesRecovered.description: Total defensive fumble recoveries by the player in the game

FumbleReturnYards.description: Total fumble return yards by the player in the game

FumbleReturnTouchdowns.description: Total fumble return touchdowns by the player in the game

Interceptions.description: Total defensive interceptions by the player in the game

InterceptionReturnYards.description: Total defensive interception return yards by the player in the game

InterceptionReturnTouchdowns.description: Total defensive interception return touchdowns by the player in the game

BlockedKicks.description: Total blocked kicks by the player in the game. Note: BlockedKicks include Field Goals and Punts but NOT Extra Points

Punts.description: Total number of punts by the player in the game

PuntYards.description: Total punt yards by the player in the game

PuntAverage.description: The average number of yards per punt by the player in the game

FieldGoalsAttempted.description: Total field goals attempted by the player in the game

FieldGoalsMade.description: Total field goals made by the player in game

FieldGoalsLongestMade.description: Longest field goal made by the player in the game

ExtraPointsMade.description: Total extra points made by the player in the game

TwoPointConversionPasses.description: Total successful two point conversion passes by the player in the game

TwoPointConversionRuns.description: Total successful two point conversion rushes by the player in the game

TwoPointConversionReceptions.description: Total successful two point conversion receptions by the player in the game

FantasyPoints.description: Fantasy points scored based on basic fantasy scoring system by the player in the game

FantasyPointsPPR.description: This field is expected to be NULL

ReceptionPercentage.description: Total percentage of receiving targets that were receptions by the player in the game

ReceivingYardsPerTarget.description: Average receiving yards per target by the player in the game

Tackles.description: Total tackles (solo & assisted) by the player in the game

OffensiveTouchdowns.description: Total offensive touchdowns scored by the player in the game

DefensiveTouchdowns.description: Total defensive touchdowns scored by the player in the game

SpecialTeamsTouchdowns.description: Total special teams touchdowns scored by the player in the game

Touchdowns.description: Total touchdowns scored by the player in the game (excludes passing touchdowns)

FantasyPosition.description: The player's fantasy football position. Possible values: QB; RB; WR; TE; DL; LB; DB; K; P; OL

FieldGoalPercentage.description: Total field goal attempts made by the player in the game

PlayerGameID.description: Unique ID of PlayerGame record (subject to change, although it very rarely does).  For a static ID, use a combination of GameKey and PlayerID.

FumblesOwnRecoveries.description: Total own fumble recoveries by the player in the game. Note: this fumble doesn't result in a turnover - the fumbling team recovers the fumble

PuntTouchbacks.description: Total punts that resulted in touchbacks by the player in the game

PuntInside20.description: Total punts downed inside the 20 yard line by the player in the game

PuntNetAverage.description: The average net yards per punt by the player in the game

ExtraPointsAttempted.description: Total extra point kicks attempted by the player in the game

BlockedKickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total blocked kick recovery return touchdowns for the player in the game

FieldGoalReturnTouchdowns.description: Total field goal return touchdowns by the player in the game. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

Safeties.description: Total defensive safeties scored by the player in the game

FieldGoalsHadBlocked.description: Total field goals by the player that were blocked in the game

PuntsHadBlocked.description: Total punts by the player that were blocked in the game

ExtraPointsHadBlocked.description: Total extra point kick attempts by the player that were blocked in the game

PuntLong.description: The longest punt by the player in the game

BlockedKickReturnYards.description: Total blocked kick recovery return yards for the player in the game

FieldGoalReturnYards.description: Total field goal return yards by the player in the game. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

PuntNetYards.description: The net yards of the punts by the player in the game

ShortName.description: The first initial and last name of the player (J. Doe)

PlayingSurface.description: The playing surface of the stadium

Humidity.description: The humidity percentage at the start of the game

WindSpeed.description: The wind speed at the start of the game (in MPH)

FanDuelSalary.description: The player's salary for FanDuel daily fantasy contests.

DraftKingsSalary.description: The player's salary for DraftKings daily fantasy contests.

FantasyDataSalary.description: The player's salary as calculated by SportsDataIO (formerly known as FantasyData).  Based on the same salary cap as DraftKings contests ($50,000).

OffensiveSnapsPlayed.description: Total snaps this player played on offense in the game. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

DefensiveSnapsPlayed.description: Total snaps this player played on defense in the game. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

SpecialTeamsSnapsPlayed.description: Total snaps this player played on special teams in the game. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

OffensiveTeamSnaps.description: Total offensive snaps this player's team played in the game. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

DefensiveTeamSnaps.description: Total defensive snaps this player's team played in the game. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

SpecialTeamsTeamSnaps.description: Total special teams snaps this player's team played in the game. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

VictivSalary.description: The player's salary for Victiv daily fantasy contests.

TwoPointConversionReturns.description: Total successful two point conversion returns by the player in the game

FantasyPointsFanDuel.description: Fantasy points based on FanDuel's scoring system by the player in the game

FieldGoalsMade0to19.description: Total field goals of 0 to 19 yards made by the player in game

FieldGoalsMade20to29.description: Total field goals of 20 to 29 yards made by the player in game

FieldGoalsMade30to39.description: Total field goals of 30 to 39 yards made by the player in game

FieldGoalsMade40to49.description: Total field goals of 40 to 49 yards made by the player in game

FieldGoalsMade50Plus.description: Total field goals of 50+ yards made by the player in game

FantasyPointsDraftKings.description: Fantasy points based on DraftKings' scoring system by the player in the game

YahooSalary.description: The player's salary for Yahoo daily fantasy contests

FantasyPointsYahoo.description: Fantasy points based on Yahoo's daily fantasy scoring system by the player in the game

InjuryStatus.description: The player's current injury status; in the form of likelihood that player plays (Probable; Questionable; Doubtful; Out)

InjuryBodyPart.description: The body part that is injured for the player (Knee; Groin; Calf; Hamstring; etc.)

InjuryStartDate.description: The day that the player's injury started or was first discovered

InjuryNotes.description: A brief description of the player's injury and expected availability

FanDuelPosition.description: The player's eligible position in FanDuel's daily fantasy sports platform.

DraftKingsPosition.description: The player's eligible position in DraftKings' daily fantasy sports platform.

YahooPosition.description: The player's eligible position in Yahoo's daily fantasy sports platform

OpponentRank.description: The ranking of the player's opponent with regards to fantasy points allowed.

OpponentPositionRank.description: The ranking of the player's opponent by position with regards to fantasy points allowed.

DeclaredInactive.description: Whether the player has been declared inactive. This value is updated in the hours leading up to game start time; as teams announce their inactive players.  Note: This is only updated for offensive skill position players (QB; RB; WR; TE)

FantasyDraftSalary.description: The player's salary for FantasyDraft daily fantasy contests.

FantasyDraftPosition.description: The player's eligible position in FantasyDraft's daily fantasy sports platform.

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team that the player is on. Note: if the player is a free agent; this field is NULL

OpponentID.description: The unique ID of this opponent team

Day.description: The date of the game (in US Eastern Time)

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

GlobalGameID.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalOpponentID.description: A globally unique ID for this opposing team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

FantasyPointsFantasyDraft.description: This field is no longer in use and will return null.

ScoringDetails.description: The details of the scoring plays this player recorded in the game

SnapCountsConfirmed.description: Whether snap count fields are confirmed (true/false). Note: This takes place the morning after the game.

Updated.description: Time of last update (in US Eastern time). Note: this does not indicate that stats changed.
